calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2017 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Rosario Mercado And Romeo Mercado'S Hearing Re Examination Into And Determination Of Plaintiff'S Title Pursuant To Ccp Sec 764.010
Off Calendar Feb-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joyce Cram, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Gena Eales, CSR 176.

Martin Zurada, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ROSARIO S. MERCADO, sworn and examined,
No appearance by defaulted defendants WILLIAM P. BENNETT and ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN, CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE, OR INTEREST IN THE REAL PROPERTY DESCRIBED IN THE COMPLAINT ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFFS' TITLE, OR ANY CLOUD ON PLAINTIFFS' TITLE THERETO,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-100 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff ROSARIO S. MERCADO and against Defaulted Defendant WILLIAM P. BENNETT as follows:

IT IS ORDERED that Plaintiffs Rosario S. Mercado and Romeo E. Mercado are the sole and exclusive owners in fee simple of the real property known as 722 Sunnyvale Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94134 (APN: BLOCK 6304, LOT 19A)(the "Real Property") described as follows:

"BEGINNING AT A POINT ON THE NORTHEASTERLY LINE OF SUNNYDALE AVENUE, DISTANT THEREON 75 FEET NORTHWESTERLY FROM THE NORTHWESTERLY LINE OF RUTLAND STREET; RUNNING THENCE NORTHWESTERLY ALONG SAID LINE OF SUNNYDALE AVENUE 30 FEET 8 INCES; THENCE AT A RIGHT ANGLE NORTHEASTERLY 76 FEET; THENCE AT A RIGHT ANGLE SOUTHEASTERLY 30 FEET 8 INCHES; THENCE AT A RIGHT ANGLE SOUTHWESTERLY 76 FEET TO THE POINT OF BEGINNING."

BEING PORTION OF LOSTS 64, 65, AND 66, BEN FRANKLIN, HOMESTEAD ASSOCIATION.

APN: BLOCK 6304, LOT 19A.

The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2017 Continued To Mar-29-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing And Hearing Re Examination Into And Determination Of Plaintiff'S Title Pursuant To Ccp Sec 764.010
Off Calendar Jan-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jamie Retmier, 925-937-3900 (courtcall) for Planitiff/Moving parties Rosario and Romeo Mercado.

Not argued. Ms. Retmier seeks clarification from the Court regarding the tentative ruling. The Court answers Ms. Retmier questions. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ROSARIO MERCADO and ROMEO MERCADO's Hearing Re Examination Into And Determination Of Plaintiff'S Title Pursuant To Ccp Sec 764.010 is Continued to February 9, 2017 to be heard in Department 514. Plaintiff shall obtain a default prior to the hearing. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing And Hearing Re Examination Into And Determination Of Plaintiff'S Title Pursuant To Ccp Sec 764.010
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Continued To Jan-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ROSARIO MERCADO, ROMEO MERCADO's Hearing Re Examination Into And Determination Of Plaintiff'S Title Pursuant To Ccp Sec 764.010 is continued to January 6, 2017 for moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers no later than December 16, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
